strengths: Clear visual proof of the app's core feature (OTP warning) is shown.
The on-image headline and proof clearly communicate the problem and solution.

fixes: Improve the legibility of the headline text ('An OTP scam can change your account. This SMS app warns you') by ensuring sufficient contrast against its background. The current semi-transparent speech bubble overlapping the phone outline makes the text difficult to read on mobile.

fixes: While effective, exploring subtle variations in the abstract shapes or color palette could potentially enhance a thematic connection to digital security or communication, without adding clutter.
